---
title: "Minimal Thebe Test"
format:
  html:
    code-tools: true
jupyter: python3
execute:
  echo: true
  eval: true
thebe: true
include-in-header: thebe-header.html
filters:
  - pyodide
---

## Minimal Thebe Test

This is a minimal test to check Thebe interactivity.

```{pyodide-python}
print("Hello from Thebe!")
```
